faq.q: What is the best time to visit Mariamman Temple, Irukkankudi?
faq.a: The best time to visit Mariamman Temple, Irukkankudi is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Mariamman Temple, Irukkankudi?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Madurai Airport (57 km) and the nearest railway station is Madurai Junction (67 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Mariamman Temple, Irukkankudi?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Mariamman Temple, Irukkankudi at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Mariamman Temple, Irukkankudi?
faq.a: Stays in Mariamman Temple, Irukkankudi start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Mariamman Temple, Irukkankudi?
faq.a: The top attractions are Sankaralingapuram, Masarpatti, Sattur.
